title: 10 best herbal creams for nerve pain
description: Curcuma longa, also known as turmeric, creams helps with nerve pain because it contains a powerful compound called curcumin. Curcumin has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce inflammation and alleviate nerve damage. By blocking the production of pain-causing chemicals and promoting healing in damaged nerves, curcumin cream can provide effective relief from nerve pain.
